case_title: YAN WEH JIANG RESPONDENT VS. DARIN HILDEBRANDT APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION IN RE CONTINUANCE OF HEARING DATE
MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT JIANG, YAN WEH RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF HILDEBRANDT, DARIN $3,688.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,720.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT HILDEBRANDT, DARIN AS TO RESPONDENT JIANG, YAN WEH HEARING SET FOR JUL-15-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2004 - CONTINUED TO AUG-19-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 PER STIPULATION.

CASE ASSIGNED TO D503 FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARING. NO APPEARANCE FOR THE APPELLANT. JOSEPH H. WOLCH APPEARING FOR RESPONDENT. CASE WAS PRESENTED TO THE COURT, WITNESS SWORN, EXHIBITS INTRODUCED. CASE SUBMITTED. COURT FOUND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT SARA YAN WEN JIANG AND AGAINST APPELLANT DARIN HILDEBRANDT FOR $3,688.00 FOR DAMAGES AND $32.00 FOR COSTS. APPELLANT WAS TO TAKE NOTHING IN HIS CLAIM. JUDGMENT WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. EXHIBITS WERE ORDERED RETURNED. CASE WAS REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT PURSUANT TO CCP116.780(D). NOT REPORTED.
